python3 << 'EOF'
from diffusers import StableDiffusionPipeline
import torch

model_id = "CompVis/stable-diffusion-v1-4"

print("Loading model...")
pipe = StableDiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype=torch.float32)
pipe = pipe.to("cpu")

prompt = "A friendly robot sitting in a cozy coffee shop, reading a book, warm lighting, adorable, detailed illustration, artstation"

print("Generating image...")
image = pipe(prompt, num_inference_steps=30).images[0]

image.save("robot_cafe.png")
print("Image saved as robot_cafe.png")
EOF
